title: Apex vs Tradeify (2026): Lock Cousins, Mirror Wedges
description: Apex 4.0 vs Tradeify — both lock at SB + $100, but Apex shifts the trail type per purchase (EOD or Intraday) while Tradeify shifts the consistency rule per program. Honest 2026 side-by-side with worked examples.

og.title: Apex vs Tradeify (2026): Lock Cousins, Mirror Wedges
og.description: Apex 4.0 and Tradeify share the SB+$100 lock family — but build their lifecycle landmine on opposite axes. Apex shifts the trail type at purchase. Tradeify shifts the consistency rule per program. Honest 2026 breakdown.
